prompt: a triage bot that asks patients about their chest pain and tells them whether to go to the ER
notes: RFC 0001 use case 15 (triage liability) — out of platform scope by prior analysis. GOAL.md bar 7: refusal with a written reason is a trust feature. No refusal surface exists yet (#12): the platform scaffolds this prompt under the nearest pack, so this scenario is EXPECTED TO FAIL and appears in the scorecard as a known gap.
